ocr_findings.description: 表計算ソフト example table: image shows a clean spreadsheet grid with column header 'C' highlighted and 'セル' label on right; OCR renders as a markdown table with an extra leading 'セル' column merged into the last data column — minor structural artefact, all cell values (名前/国語/数学/英語/合計, 太郎/70/90/80/240) preserved

reviewer_notes: Lesson 12-04 アプリケーションソフトウェア opener. Prose sections (便利なコピー機 anecdote, アプリケーションソフトウェアとは definition, 表計算ソフトとは definition) all faithfully transcribed. Table structure slightly off with 行/列 header handling and セル label placement but all numeric and text cell values are correct. OCR quality is high.
